name: Tendi
oneliner: AI-powered personal financial advisor trained to outperform on the CFP exam, connected to 12,000+ financial institutions
finserv: Trained specifically on financial planning; scores higher than all other AI models on CFP exam; connected to 12,000+ institutions
team: Limited public data on founding team
thesis: Tendi represents a pure-play personal finance agent that could serve as a 'front door' connecting consumers to You's infrastructure. The CFP-level training and 12,000+ institution connections demonstrate serious finserv commitment.
